title: Bad Aur Badnaam
desc: Story begins with three villains getting a lot of money and new identities from rich man Pedro getting killed in return. Later two secret agents - James (Sanjeev Kumar) from Ringania and Ashwinikumar (Shatrughan Sinha) from Indian intelligence Bureau are shown at the top of their game. Due to some misconception, they brcome sworn enemies but meanwhile they have their jobs to do. Ashwinikumar is investigating a mysteriousplot to kill a VVIP in Delhi while James is no a Ringanian mission in india. They fight and temporarity make Peace and the rest of the movie is about their joint effort to figure out the mystery and ruin the evil plot.

title: Aatish
desc: Baba turns to crime to support his brother, Avinash. However, Baba keeps him distant from the underworld nexus, but problems escalate when Avinash becomes a cop and is assigned to arrest his own brother.

title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

title: Bhrashtachar
desc: Journalist Bhavani intends to expose and bring to justice a corrupt politician who pretends to be a social worker; however, she soon finds herself trapped in a web of conspiracies.
